title: Digiprint
description: digiprint.pl zoominfo.com/c/digiprint/372856266 leading Polish company established in 2000 that delivers innovative solutions for the printing industry. They specialize in digital and flexographic printing technologies, wide-format production, and packaging design, partnering with global brands like HP Indigo and Esko. Beyond equipment sales, Digiprint provides expert installation, training, and after-sales support to help print businesses thrive in a digital era
